testcase.name: SC-00-T04 · Adversarial · 探索性边界 (3 cases) › TC-00-T04-ADV (a) timeout_800ms_triggers_degradation: 1500ms 延迟 · stale JWT · abort 后落 /home + banner
SC-00-T04 · Adversarial · 探索性边界 (3 cases) › TC-00-T04-ADV (b) no_jwt_5xx_falls_to_welcome: 无 JWT + resolve 500 → /welcome (NOT /home, NOT /auth/login)
SC-00-T04 · Adversarial · 探索性边界 (3 cases) › TC-00-T04-ADV (c) stub_token_path_param_in_telemetry: /s/abc123 → anon_stub_view 的 token_hash 是 djb2 hash 非明文
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (a) shared_stub_renders: /s/abc123 → stub UI visible · /api/share/* count===0
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (b) welcomeback_stub_renders: /welcome-back → stub UI · device-refresh + 二次 resolve count===0
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (c) observer_stub_renders: /observer/ABC123 → stub UI · /api/observer/* count===0
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (d) stub_cta_redirects_to_login: shared stub CTA click → URL pathname === /auth/login
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (e) offline_banner_with_stale_jwt: resolve 5xx + stale JWT → /home + banner visible · 文字 "离线模式"
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (f) offline_banner_close_persists: close → hidden · reload + 仍 5xx → banner 不再出现
